message:
Add generic type inference to createParser() and parsePartialJson()

Both APIs now accept an optional schema ({ safeParse }) to auto-infer T
from Zod, Valibot, ArkType, or any compatible library:

- createParser<T>(schema): getValue() returns T | undefined, rejects on
  schema failure (same as incomplete — stream hasn't produced valid data)
- parsePartialJson<T>(input, schema): returns DeepPartial<T> with a
  discriminated union on state for type narrowing. Repaired-parse keeps
  the raw partial value when validation fails (missing fields expected).
- PartialJsonResult is now a discriminated union — checking state narrows
  the value type automatically
- Exports DeepPartial<T> utility type matching Vercel AI SDK's pattern
- StreamingParser<T> and PartialJsonResult<T> are generic with = unknown
  default, fully backward compatible
